title: MCX
body:
# MCX
MCX is a vanilla-plus mod made in MCreator to minecraft 1.19.2.
Travel around the world, decore your house with new blocks and obtain gems...
All of this features are included. 
## New content to minecraft added by MCX:

- New flowers
- New gems
- New wood (WIP)
- New stone
- More blocks
- New biomes (WIP)
- /survival, /creative, /spectator & /adventure commands for fast switch between gamemodes
- More in future updates...
## Update frequency
This mod and the developer is active making updates. Every month usually will be a new update. For dev-versions will be a separate project
